title: Congratulating the North Dakota State University Bison football team for winning the 2024 National Collegiate Athletic Association Division I Football Championship Subdivision title.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
plain_summary: This congressional resolution celebrates the North Dakota State University Bison football team for winning the 2024 college football national championship. The Bison won their nineteenth national title overall and their tenth championship in just fourteen years. The resolution congratulates not only the players but also their coaches, school leaders, and fans who supported the team. This shows how successful the Bison football program has been over many years.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.

sections.title: Resolution Title
sections.text: This resolution congratulates the North Dakota State University Bison football team for winning the 2024 National Collegiate Athletic Association Division I Football Championship Subdivision title.

sections.title: Background Information
sections.text: On January sixth, two thousand twenty five, the North Dakota State University Bison football team won the two thousand twenty four college football championship game. They beat the Montana State University Bobcats by a score of thirty five to thirty two in a close game played in Frisco, Texas. This was the nineteenth national football championship that the Bison have won in their history. The Bison have won ten out of the last fourteen championship games from two thousand eleven to two thousand twenty four. No other college football team in modern times has achieved this level of success. Since two thousand eleven, the Bison have won one hundred eighty six games and lost only twenty one games. They also won thirty nine games in a row from two thousand seventeen to two thousand twenty one. Head coach Tim Polasek led the team to this championship in his first year as head coach at the university. He and his coaching staff continued the tradition of winning that the Bison are known for. Thousands of Bison fans traveled to Texas to watch the championship game, showing how much pride and support the team has from their community called Bison Nation. This championship was a victory not just for the team but for the entire state of North Dakota.

sections.title: Official Congratulations
sections.text: The House of Representatives officially congratulates the North Dakota State University Bison football team for winning the two thousand twenty four college football championship. The House also praises the players, coaches, and staff for their hard work and dedication, and for continuing the tradition of excellence at the university. The House congratulates University President David Cook, Athletic Director Matt Larsen, and all the faculty and staff for creating an environment that supports both academic and athletic success. Finally, the House recognizes the students, alumni, and fans of North Dakota State University and all of Bison Nation for their outstanding support of the football team during their successful championship run.
